calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Hossein Navay.
No appearance by the Defendant: Catherine Barry Granlees and Raul Manuel Gonzalez.
9:25 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Hossein Navay, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 10-5-03------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 5-7-04------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at:
100 Scott St., #3, San Francisco.
Per Diem Damages $3,507.27
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $314.39
Total $4,481.66
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2004 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Advanced From Jul-19-04 To Jul-12-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. (415) 626-6494 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Navay
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT CATHERINE GRANLEES and RAUL GONZALES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
1st Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend; notice is mathematically defective;
2nd Cause of Action is OVERRULED with 5 days leave to answer from the date of notice of entry of order. Order signed. (301/AS/EH) Reporter: Valerie Papale, CSR #6899
